outputs.description: Database ID for this job event. AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.type Data type for this job event.
outputs.name: AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.id

outputs.description: URL for this job event. AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.created Date
outputs.name: AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.url

outputs.description: AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.modified Date Timestamp indicating when this job event was last modified.
outputs.name: Timestamp indicating when this job event was created.

outputs.description: Job ID. AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.event The specific event. For example, runner_on_failed (Host Failed), runner_on_start (Host Started), etc.
outputs.name: AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.job

outputs.description: Job event counter. AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.event_display Event display. For example, Playbook Started.
outputs.name: AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.counter

outputs.description: The event level. AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.failed Whether the job failed.
outputs.name: AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.event_level

outputs.description: Whether the job changed. AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.uuid UUID of the job event.
outputs.name: AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.changed

outputs.description: Parent UUID. AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.host Host ID associated with the event.
outputs.name: AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.parent_uuid

outputs.description: Host name associated with the event. AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.playbook Playbook name of this job.
outputs.name: AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.host_name

outputs.description: Task name. AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.stdout Standard output of the job.
outputs.name: AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.task

outputs.description: Starting line number of the execution. AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.end_line Ending line number of the execution.
outputs.name: AnsibleAWX.JobEvents.start_line
